calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-26-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Brenda Fields
Petitioner, present in pro per with minor's father, was sworn and examined. Father signed petition in court.
The Court grants the petition for change of minor's name to Sean Adriene Petitt.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Reset To Aug-21-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Leticia Perez, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Matter is continued to Thursday, August, 21, 2003 at 9AM in Dep. 218
